zh.Drayton, Dooly, Georgia, United States: 美國喬治亞度利德雷頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Littleberry "L.B." Bray於1826年7月18日出生在美國喬治亞素特時，他的父親Jarett Bray39歲，母親Rebecca Lawson Or Lausen25歲。他於1850年7月10日與Rachel Robinson在美國喬治亞素特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1850年住在美國喬治亞素特素特且於1870年住在美國喬治亞。他於1863年登記服兵役。他於1880年在美國喬治亞度利被列為miller。他去世於1883年1月30日在美國喬治亞度利享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Littleberry "L.B." Bray于1826年7月18日出生在美国乔治亚州素特时，他的父亲Jarett Bray39岁，母亲Rebecca Lawson Or Lausen25岁。他于1850年7月10日与Rachel Robinson在美国乔治亚州素特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1850年住在美国乔治亚州素特素特且于1870年住在美国乔治亚州。他于1863年登记服兵役。他于1880年在美国乔治亚州度利被列为miller。他去世于1883年1月30日在美国乔治亚州度利享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Berkshire and Devon. The former is probably named with Old French bray ‘marsh’, the latter from the Cornish element bre ‘hill’.
English: perhaps a topographic name from northern Middle English bra ‘steep (river) bank’ or ‘brow of a hill’, denoting someone who lived at such a place.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy or Picardy called Bray (Eure, Calvados, Aisne, Somme); see 6.

variants.name: Dubray
meanings: French: habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, for someone from any of various minor places called Bray (see Bray ).
Altered form of French   Dubreuil  . This surname is common among Native Americans, namely the Cheyenne River Sioux in SD.

variants.name: Braye
meanings: English (Sussex): from the Middle English female personal name Braye. Its origin is unknown but it might derive from Breton bregh ‘fine, brave’.

variants.name: Brais
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Aldea, Andre, Cecile, Fernande, Stephane.

nameMeanings.name: "L.B."
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Second Great Awakening
historicEvents.description: Being a second spiritual and religious awakening, like the First Great Awakening, many Churches began to spring up from other denominations. Many people began to rapidly join the Baptist and Methodist congregations. Many converts to these religions believed that the Awakening was the precursor of a new millennial age.
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Historical Boundaries: 1856: Sumter, Georgia, United States

Civil War History - Some 11,000 Georgians gave their lives in defense of their state a state that suffered immense destruction. But wars end brought about an even more dramatic figure to tell: 460,000 African-Americans were set free from the shackles of slavery to begin new lives as free people.
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: The First National Park
historicEvents.description: Yellowstone National Park was given the title of the first national park by the U.S. Congress and signed into law by President Ulysses S. Grant. It is also believed to be the first national park in the world.

historicEvents.title: The Amnesty Act
historicEvents.description: A federal law which reversed most of the penalties on former Confederate soldiers by the Fourteenth Amendment. The Act affected over 150,000 troops that were a part of the Civil War.

en.lifeSummary: When Littleberry "L.B." Bray was born on 18 July 1826, in Sumter, Georgia, United States, his father, Jarett Bray, was 39 and his mother, Rebecca Lawson Or Lausen, was 25. He married Rachel Robinson on 10 July 1850, in Sumter, Georgia, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Sumter, Sumter, Georgia, United States in 1850 and Georgia, United States in 1870. He registered for military service in 1863. In 1880, at the age of 54, his occupation is listed as miller in Dooly, Georgia, United States. He died on 30 January 1883, in Dooly, Georgia, United States, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Littleberry "L.B." Bray est né le 18 juillet 1826, à Sumter, Géorgie, États-Unis, son père, Jarett Bray, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Rebecca Lawson Or Lausen, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Rachel Robinson le 10 juillet 1850, à Sumter, Géorgie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il a vécu à Sumter, Sumter, Géorgie, États-Unis en 1850 et à Géorgie, États-Unis en 1870. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1863. En 1880, à l’âge de 54 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est miller à Dooly, Géorgie, États-Unis. Il est décédé le 30 janvier 1883, à Dooly, Géorgie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Littleberry "L.B." Bray am 18. Juli 1826 in Sumter, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jarett Bray 39 und seine Mutter Rebecca Lawson Or Lausen 25. Er hat am 10. Juli 1850 in Sumter, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten Rachel Robinson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1850 hat er in Sumter, Sumter, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten und 1870 in Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er hat sich 1863 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1880, als er 54 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als miller in Dooly, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. Januar 1883 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Dooly, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Littleberry "L.B." Bray è nato il il 18 luglio 1826 nel Sumter, Georgia, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Jarett Bray, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Rebecca Lawson Or Lausen, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Rachel Robinson il 10 luglio 1850, nel Sumter, Georgia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Sumter, Sumter, Georgia, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1850 e nel Georgia, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1870. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1863. Nel 1880, all'età di 54 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come miller nel Dooly, Georgia, Stati Uniti d'America. Morì il 30 gennaio 1883, nel Dooly, Georgia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Littleberry "L.B." Brayが1826年7月18日にアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州スムターで生まれた時，父Jarett Brayは39歳，母Rebecca Lawson Or Lausenは25歳であった。1850年7月10日にアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州スムターでRachel Robinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1850年にはアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州スムタースムターに，1870年にはアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州に住んでいた。彼は1863年に兵役登録をした。1880年，54歳の時，アメリカ合衆国ジョージア州ドオリーでの職業はmillerと記録されている。彼は1883年1月30日にアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州ドオリーで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Littleberry "L.B." Bray(이)가 1826년 7월 18일 미국 조지아 주 수터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jarett Bray(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Rebecca Lawson Or Lausen(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1850년 7월 10일 미국 조지아 주 수터에서 Rachel Robinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1850년도에 미국 조지아 주 수터 수터에서, 1870년도에 미국 조지아 주에서 살았다. 그는 1863년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1880년, 54세의 나이로 그의 직업은 미국 조지아 주 도리에서 miller이었다. 그는 1883년 1월 30일 미국 조지아 주 도리에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Littleberry "L.B." Bray nasceu em 18 de julho de 1826, em Sumter, Geórgia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Jarett Bray, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Rebecca Lawson Or Lausen, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Rachel Robinson em 10 de julho de 1850, em Sumter, Geórgia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Sumter, Sumter, Geórgia, Estados Unidos da América em 1850 e em Geórgia, Estados Unidos da América em 1870. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1863. Em 1880, com 54 anos, sua profissão aparece como miller em Dooly, Geórgia, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu em 30 de janeiro de 1883, em Dooly, Geórgia, Estados Unidos da América, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Littleberry "L.B." Bray родился 18 июля 1826 г. в местности сумтир, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Jarett Bray было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Rebecca Lawson Or Lausen, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Rachel Robinson 10 июля 1850 г. в местности сумтир, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности сумтир, сумтир, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты в 1850 году и в местности Джорджия, Соединенные штаты в 1870 году. В 1863 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1880 году, в возрасте 54 лет, работал по профессии miller в местности дули, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты. Он умер 30 января 1883 г. в местности дули, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 56 лет.

es.18 July 1826–30 January 1883: 18 de julio de 1826–30 de enero de 1883
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Littleberry "L.B." Bray nació el 18 de julio de 1826, en Sumter, Georgia, Estados Unidos, su papá, Jarett Bray, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Rebecca Lawson Or Lausen, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Rachel Robinson el 10 de julio de 1850, en Sumter, Georgia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Sumter, Sumter, Georgia, Estados Unidos en 1850 y en Georgia, Estados Unidos en 1870. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1863. En 1880, a la edad de 54 años, su ocupación registrada era miller en Dooly, Georgia, Estados Unidos. Murió el 30 de enero de 1883, en Dooly, Georgia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 56 años.
